channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Clockwork Girl Episode Yasuomi Umetsu, Shaft的 Virgin Punk Original 动画 Available Digital Purchase September
item.description: Anime screened in Japan, U.S. in 2025 ― Aniplex of America announced during its 2026 San Diego Comic-Con panel on Thursday that "Clockwork Girl," the first story in director Yasuomi Umetsu and... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 'Clockwork Girl' Episode of Yasuomi Umetsu, Shaft's Virgin Punk Original Anime Available for Digital Purchase in September
